mode.description: Digest mode: 'daily' for operational (all articles, granular), 'weekly' for strategic (persistent themes, leadership-level)

days_back.description: Number of days to look back (auto-set: 1 for daily, 7 for weekly; override if needed)

include_html.description: Generate an HTML digest of the results

include_slack.description: Generate and send a Slack digest (requires SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL env var)

include_competitors.description: Track competitor mentions (Elliptic, TRM Labs, CipherTrace, Arkham, Nansen, Crystal)

include_email.description: Generate HTML email digest in the Chainalysis News Digest format

trend_lookback_days.description: How many days of prior runs to check for recurring narratives (auto-set: 14 for daily, 30 for weekly)

google_news_publications.description: List of unique publications that mentioned Chainalysis (via Google News)

google_news_publication_count.description: Number of unique publications covering Chainalysis

executive_summary.description: AI-generated overview of the day's key themes

key_narratives.description: Major narrative threads with recurrence tracking (cadence, momentum, articles, Chainalysis relevance)

chainalysis_mentions.description: Articles directly mentioning Chainalysis (from Google News + RSS)

narrative_coverage.description: Articles relevant to Chainalysis policy domains

competitor_intelligence.description: Competitor tracking: summary, highlights, per-competitor stats, and articles

html_digest.description: Full HTML digest with all three prongs (if include_html=true)

email_digest.description: HTML email — daily operational digest or weekly strategic briefing depending on mode

slack_summary.description: Slack Block Kit payload with text and blocks (if include_slack=true)

slack_delivery.description: Slack webhook delivery result — sent status and any errors (if include_slack=true)
